description: Semantic knowledge base storing durable facts promoted from episodic memory patterns.

alternateKeys.purpose: Enables safe upsert pattern — prevents duplicate facts for the same context. The hash is deterministic so concurrent promotion runs converge to the same row.

columns.description: Primary column — short human-readable summary of the knowledge fact.
Natural language statement of the knowledge fact (e.g., 'User always delegates procurement emails to jane@example.com').
Deterministic hash for upsert deduplication. Computed from fact type + key context attributes (e.g., SHA-256 of factType|senderEmail|delegationTarget).
Confidence level (0.0–1.0) based on the number and consistency of supporting episodic events.
Number of supporting episodic memory events that contributed to this fact.
Timestamp when this fact was last reinforced by a matching episodic event.
Explicit expiry date for people-dependent facts (e.g., delegation targets who may leave). Nullable — null means no explicit expiry.
Soft-delete flag for confidence decay. Set to false when confidence drops below threshold or the fact expires. Agent queries filter on cr_isactive = true.
Whether this fact was promoted from an explicit user persona rule. Persona-sourced facts have higher initial confidence.
columns._naming_note: Recommended name: cr_iscreatedfrompersona (cr_is* prefix convention). Not renamed to avoid breaking existing flow references.

junctionTable.description: Junction table linking semantic knowledge facts to their supporting episodic memory events. Many-to-many relationship.

lookups.description: Lookup to the semantic knowledge fact.
Lookup to the supporting episodic memory event.

cr_semanticknowledgeid.description: When a semantic knowledge fact is deleted, all junction rows linking to it are also deleted.

cr_episodicmemoryid.description: When an episodic memory event is deleted (e.g., by 90-day retention cleanup), all junction rows linking to it are also deleted.

notes.design_rationale: Facts are upserted using the cr_contexthash alternate key. On each promotion run, the flow computes the hash from the fact's key attributes and upserts — incrementing cr_eventcount and updating cr_confidencescore and cr_lastvalidated. This makes concurrent runs safe and idempotent.
notes.confidence_decay: A scheduled flow checks cr_lastvalidated. If a fact has not been reinforced within 60 days, cr_confidencescore is halved. If it drops below 0.2, cr_isactive is set to false (soft-delete). USER_EXPLICIT facts decay at half the rate.
notes.junction_table: The cr_semanticepisodic junction table enables traceability — the agent can explain why it holds a belief by listing the supporting events. The junction is populated by the promotion flow and pruned when episodic events are deleted by the 90-day retention cleanup.
notes.security: Table uses UserOwned ownership type. Row-level security is enforced via an ownership-based security role so each user's knowledge base is private.
notes.system_columns: Standard Dataverse system columns (ownerid, createdon, modifiedon, statecode, statuscode) are created automatically and do not need to be defined here.
